name: opencv-ts-webgpu
description: OpenCV.ts 5.0 — TypeScript-first, WebGPU-native Computer Vision framework

scripts.build:demo: vite build --config vite.config.pages.ts && rm -rf demo-webapp/public && cp -r dist demo-webapp/public && cp demo/assets/josh-demo.mp4 demo-webapp/public/assets/ && cp -r src/backends/wasm/pkg demo-webapp/public/assets/pkg
